parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Administrator
participant ":Main UI" as MainUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as UI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as Controller
participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as List
participant "reader:XmlReader" as Reader

UI -> Administrator : Request file path
Administrator --> UI : file path
UI -> Controller : addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
activate Controller
Controller -> Reader : importReadingsOfSensor(path)
activate Reader
Reader --> Controller : listOfReadingsDto
deactivate Reader
Controller -> List : getAllSensors( )
activate List
List --> Controller : listOfAreaSensors
deactivate List
Controller -> Controller : setReadingsBySensorIDescription( )
Controller --> UI : number of lines added
deactivate Controller
UI --> Administrator : number of lines added
@enduml
```
